rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Amata Anantaprayoon
rule_metadata.title: CVE-2024-23692 - Rejetto HTTP File Server Unauthenticated RCE

rules.rule_text:
title: CVE-2024-23692 - Rejetto HTTP File Server Unauthenticated RCE
id: d9e0fbfc-ee95-45e7-82db-5124ddfd3cb0
description: Vulnerability allows unauthenticated remote attackers to execute arbitrary
  commands on the target system.
status: experimental
author: NTT Security - Amata Anantaprayoon
date: 2024-06-11
modified: 2024-06-11
references:
- https://mohemiv.com/all/rejetto-http-file-server-2-3m-unauthenticated-rce/
- https://github.com/rapid7/metasploit-framework/pull/19240
- https://attackerkb.com/assessments/f5c5359d-2446-4e33-a1a2-6a66aa2fb5f6
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: hfs.exe
    Image|startswith: C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
tags:
- attack.execution
